title: Blackmoor 5-Piece Knife Set/Comes with Freestanding Storage Block/Stainless Steel Knives/Non-Stick Black Marble Coating/Easy Clean/Modern & Stylish Kitchen Accessory - 66929
features: 5 PIECE KNIFE SET – This modern and stylish black marble effect 5-piece knife set will allow you to slice, dice, chop, or carve a wide variety of meats, fish, vegetables and breads with great precision every time you cook in the kitchen.

SET INCLUDES – This knife set with block features an 8-inch chef’s knife, an 8-inch carving knife, and an 8-inch bread knife, as well as a 5-inch utility knife, and a 3.5-inch paring knife. All of the knives sit in the stylish matching black marble knife tower.

EASY CLEAN – These kitchen knives are easy to care for, and can simply be cleaned by hand. The beauty of these knives is that they are rust resistant, giving you peace of mind that they will aid you in the kitchen for meal preparation for many years to come.

NON-STICK MARBLE COATING – The marble coating on these knives makes them non-stick, which is ideal for meal preparation, as the foods will fall straight onto the chopping board, and ready to be placed in the pan. The knives are all manufactured from stainless steel, and feature lightweight and ergonomic handles for added comfort and control.

BLACKMOOR - Blackmoor is the market leading provider of the very best kitchen essentials to inspire the everyday home cook. Find everything from pots and pans, to knife sets, bakeware essentials and cooking utensils all at the Blackmoor Amazon store page today!
